pipeline.name: NYU Langone
pipeline.notes: Phase 1 proposal submitted Apr 14, 2026. 12-month engagement, $35K/month × 12 = $420K total. Extension/renewal potential: original scope discussed was $720K over 3 years ($20K-$40K/mo range).

pipeline.name: ALDF Phase 2
pipeline.notes: Phase 1 ends May 31. Susan requested continuation in writing. Three service lines: Gift Processing ($112K, Jun-Sep), Prospect Research ($58K, Jul-Dec), Strategic Advisory ($70K, Jun-Dec + potential $30K extension Jan-Jun 2027). Confirmed scope: $240K. With advisory extension: $270K.

pipeline.name: ALDF Interim HoMG
pipeline.fullName: Animal Legal Defense Fund — Interim Head of Major Gifts
pipeline.notes: Proposal sent April 15, 2026. Additive to existing ALDF engagements — does not replace Phase 1 or Phase 2. Three workstreams: (1) Buildout Phase — pipeline assessment + portfolio restructuring, $13,500 one-time, 2 months. (2) KPI Dashboard & Moves Management Tool, $16,000 one-time, 2 months. (3) Interim Head of Major Gifts, $13,000/month month-to-month ongoing while ALDF searches for permanent HoMG. Lauren Phipps (CFRE, Obama Foundation) delivering day-to-day; Leya provides strategic oversight.
